overview: Ghost King is a Boss-class Undead monster found in Inferno. 2 grades: Common, Elite. Base stats (Common): 2541 HP, 40 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Earth Quake at 150% ratio (600 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 5000, behavior tree: BT_GhostKing.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Curse Of Chilling
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Curse Of Chilling icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Curse Of Chlling Synchronizer
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Curse Of Chlling Synchronizer icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Eating
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Eating icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Divine (-1000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Evil
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Evil (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 250
strategies.description: Has 250 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1500 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 5000, ability check distance 1200
strategies.description: Combat area radius 5000. Ability check distance 1200. Ability attack delay: 30s.

strategies.title: HP Phase Triggers
strategies.description: Scream HPRatio Cycle: 20%, Summon HP Ratio: 66%. These HP thresholds trigger phase transitions, summons, or special attacks.

strategies.title: Summon Mechanics
strategies.description: summons 3 enemies. summon type: Ghost King_Small Ghost.

strategies.title: Behavior Trees: BT_GhostKing, BT_GhostKing_EatingPhase
strategies.description: Uses behavior trees: BT_GhostKing, BT_GhostKing_EatingPhase. Switches to combat behavior tree during combat phases.

strategies.title: Ability Damage Values
strategies.description: Blueprint damage parameters: Earthquake Damage Base: 3, Teleport Damage Base: 30, Scream Damage Base: 75. These are base values before scaling.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1500 units.
